name: @maestro-recorder/electron
description: Electron shell for ManualFlow — wraps the existing server + dashboard.

scripts.prepackage: npm run build:ts && npm run fetch:platform-tools && npm run build:server
scripts.premake: npm run build:ts && npm run fetch:platform-tools && npm run build:server
scripts.start: npm run build:ts && npm run fetch:platform-tools && cross-env MANUALFLOW_DEV=1 electron .
